## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Protocol evidence

For protocol changes, link the official documentation or state the Stream Dock
version and sanitized wire behavior used for verification. Write “Not
applicable” for changes unrelated to the protocol.

## Verification

- [ ] SDK tests pass.
- [ ] Counter example tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff lint and format checks pass.
- [ ] Distribution build and verification pass when packaging is affected.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated when public behavior changes.

List the exact commands or manual checks run, plus anything that could not be
verified.
